title: moraea bicolor
intro: Moraea bicolor, also known as the "Rainbow Lily," is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, characterized by its striking purple and yellow coloration. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anthraquinone glycosides content. The health benefits of Moraea bicolor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
